title: unnecessary %Warning-UNSIGNED: Comparison is constant due to unsigned arithmetic ?

features.name: signed unpacked array element comparison to zero
features.description: Code should include a comparison of an unpacked array element (typed as signed via typedef) to zero

features.name: signed typedef array indexed by localparam
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array of a signed typedef type, indexed by a localparam constant, compared to zero

features.name: signed array element assigned in always_ff
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block that assigns to array elements of a signed typedef type, then compared outside the block
